Problem 1: Target-set mismatch
s' ∉ reachable set S_codec
Ranking vs s' ≠ ranking vs D(Q(E(s')))
→ biased group rewards for GRPO

Problem 2: Uniform credit
Same sequence-level A for all t
Ignores autoregressive causality
→ misaligned advantages in GRPO

div.div:
G_t = Σ_{h≥t} γ^{h−t} r_h
A_t = group-normalize G_t at time t only
Different A_t → causal credit for autoregressive video

div.div: Figure 1. RC-GRPO vs. existing GRPO post-training. Left: scoring candidates against raw frames (target-set mismatch) and broadcasting one sequence-level advantage mis-specify GRPO's rewards R and advantages A. Right: (1) rank w.r.t. reachable reconstructions s̃'=D(Q(E(s'))); (2) project updates to preserve raw first-order progress; (3) assign per-frame-block advantages from return-to-go. Final metrics remain vs. raw s'. Backbone, tokenizer, and decoder stay frozen.
